summary: User Lookup | Page and Search Form Validation
description: Verify User Lookup page loads and input fields are available
gherkin:
When the user navigates to the "User Lookup" page using the Home screen or the left sidebar menu
Then a "Select Date Range" field should be visible on the top-left
And a text field labeled "Okta ID / Email" should be visible next to the date range field
And a "Search" button should be visible to the right of the Okta ID / Email field
And all input fields should be empty by default
And the "Search" button should be disabled or do nothing unless valid input is provided

steps.action: *When* the user navigates to the "User Lookup" page using the Home screen or the left sidebar menu
steps.result:
*Then* a "Select Date Range" field should be visible on the top-left

*And* a text field labeled "Okta ID / Email" should be visible next to the date range field

*And* a "Search" button should be visible to the right of the Okta ID / Email field

*And* all input fields should be empty by default

*And* the "Search" button should be disabled or do nothing unless valid input is provided
